columns.annotator: human_anonymous, claude, gemini, clova, or codex
columns.score: nullable integer score, 1-5 for scoring dimensions
columns.reasoning: judge reasoning text; empty for human rows

sample_personas.description: The 1,000 stratified PAK personas used for PAK-1K-eval.

calibration_anchors.description: The 10 calibration anchors used to lock the rubric.

annotators.human_anonymous: Public release label for the single human reference annotation.

probes.qwen3: qwen3 30B (generator self-preference probe). Generator-family self-preference probe. Reported against the Claude-Gemini panel, not a panel member. Some dimension scores are null from parse failures. Stored under judges/qwen3/ and not included in annotations.csv.
